name: Steven Q. McKenzie
bio: Steven Q. McKenzie has served in the City of Chicago Law Department since 2006, bringing nearly two decades of municipal law experience to his judicial candidacy. He received a Recommended from the CBA and mostly positive Alliance ratings, with one Not Recommended from the Puerto Rican Bar Association of Illinois. He is running uncontested.
background: City of Chicago Law Department attorney since 2006.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: Mixed — 1 NR from Puerto Rican Bar Association of Illinois (PRBBA); otherwise positive from Alliance associations
